headline: How Investors Are Reacting To DTE Energy (DTE) Data Center Deals, Dividend Plans And Environmental Scrutiny
summary: DTE Energy previously declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.1650 per share payable on July 15, 2026, while recent director phantom stock grants and first‑quarter 2026 results showed higher revenue of US$5,141 million but lower net income of US$247 million versus a year earlier. Analysts are increasingly focused on DTE’s long-term earnings potential from large data center power agreements and grid modernization, even as the company faces environmental scrutiny and proposed legislation such as...

headline: Is It Time To Reassess DTE Energy (DTE) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether DTE Energy at around US$142 represents fair value or if you are paying a premium for stability, this article breaks down what the current price may be implying. The stock is down 2.9% over the past week and 4.8% over the past month, but still shows a 9.3% year to date return and 10.6% over the last year. This mix of short term weakness and longer term gains can influence how you think about its risk and reward profile. Recent headlines around utilities have...
